Hero-Section.name: Hussein,
Hero-Section.aboutme: I build fast, interactive, and user-friendly web applications.

About-Section.title: About
About-Section.description:
I'm a Software Developer with 3+ years of experience building high-performance web applications using **React**, **Next.js**, and **TypeScript**.

What drives me is solving complex problems and creating seamless user experiences that actually matter. I love optimizing performance there's something satisfying about shaving milliseconds off load times.

I work across the full stack, but my real passion is frontend development where I can craft scalable, maintainable code with beautiful UI/UX. When I'm not coding, I'm always exploring new tools and frameworks to expand my skillset.

Projects-Section.title: Selected Projects
Projects-Section.Krily-Engine: Construction equipment marketplace where users can rent, buy, and sell machinery through dedicated Admin, Supplier, and Renter dashboards with integrated booking, payment, and approval workflows.
Projects-Section.Krily-Car: Car rental platform consisting of a customer mobile app and a comprehensive web administration dashboard for managing customer verification, account approvals, employees, bookings, vehicle availability, and day-to-day rental operations.
Projects-Section.Egtaely: Transportation management platform featuring a mobile application and a centralized web administration dashboard for managing buses, trips, drivers, staff, payments, scheduling, and daily operational workflows.
Projects-Section.Toyota-ecu-services: ECU tuning platform that enables clients to upload vehicle ECU files, request custom tuning modifications, track orders, manage payments, and securely receive professionally tuned files.
Projects-Section.Safaris Center: Safari operations management platform for handling customer bookings, selected services, payments, invoices, trip scheduling, operational expenses, profitability reports, and business analytics.

Contact-Section.title: Let's Connect
Contact-Section.content:
